tableName.description: The name of SeaTable table to access. Choose from the list, or specify the name using an expression.

tableId.description: The name of SeaTable table to access. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fieldsToSend.description: Whether to insert the input data this node receives in the new row

autoMapInputData.description: Use when node input properties match destination column names

defineBelow.description: Set the value for each destination column

inputsToIgnore.description: List of input properties to avoid sending, separated by commas. Leave empty to send all properties.

columnsUi.description: Add destination column with its value

columnName.description: Choose from the list, or specify the name using an expression
Choose from the list, or specify the name using an expression

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

view_name.description: Choose from the list, or specify an View Name using an expression

convert_link_id.description: Whether the ID of the linked row is returned in the link column (true). Otherwise, it return the name of the linked row (false).

direction.description: The direction of the sort, ascending (asc) or descending (desc)

order_by.description: Choose from the list, or specify a Column using an expression
